description: Browse, search, and compare Metascores and user scores for games, movies, and TV shows, plus critic and user reviews, without a Metacritic account.

novel_features.name: Full-Text Title Search
novel_features.description: FTS5 full-text search across locally synced games, movies, and TV titles.

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate group-by and count queries over locally synced Metacritic data.

novel_features.name: Compound Workflows
novel_features.description: Chain multiple API operations (browse, detail, reviews) into one agent-friendly command.
